name: Amflow PL Pro
alt: Amflow PL Pro carbon e-MTB with DJI Avinox motor
desc: Carbon frame, DJI Avinox motor, 800Wh battery. Fox 36 Factory SL fork, Fox Float X Factory shock. SRAM XO1 T-Type 12-speed. Done 150 miles — grab a bargain!

name: Amflow PL Pro Enduro
alt: Amflow PL Pro upgraded to enduro mullet setup
desc: Upgraded to enduro/mullet. RockShox Zeb Ultimate 170mm, Super Deluxe 160mm. SRAM X01 AXS T-Type, Hope Pro 5 hubs on Blueflow carbon rims. 800Wh Avinox motor.

name: Amflow PL Silver
alt: Amflow PL Silver carbon e-MTB in satin silver
desc: Satin silver carbon frame, done 20 miles from new! DJI Avinox M1 105Nm motor, 800Wh battery. Fox 36 Performance fork, Fox Float Performance shock. SRAM Eagle 70 Transmission.

name: Amflow PL Carbon XL
alt: Amflow PL Carbon heavily upgraded XL frame
desc: Heavily upgraded 2026 XL frame. RockShox Zeb Ultimate 170mm, Hayes Domain brakes. SRAM XX1 AXS T-Type, Reserve alloy 30 wheels mullet. 800Wh Avinox motor. Invisiframed from new!

name: Yeti 160 E 2024
alt: Brand new Yeti 160 E electric mountain bike
desc: Brand new! Cheapest Yeti online. Fox Factory 38 Grip2 170mm, Fox Factory X2 Float. Shimano EP801 motor, 630Wh battery. Lifetime frame warranty. Authorised dealer!

name: Moustache Game Race 160.9
alt: Moustache Game Race 160.9 e-MTB
desc: Absolutely stunning bike! Fox 38 Factory fork, Fox Float X Factory Kashima shock. Bosch Gen 5 Race motor 100Nm, 600Wh battery. SRAM X0 AXS T-Type 12-speed electronic. Carbon wheels.

name: Santa Cruz Heckler CC 2024
alt: Santa Cruz Heckler CC top spec e-MTB
desc: Top spec factory model. Shimano EP801, 720Wh battery. RockShox Zeb & Super Deluxe Ultimate. Reserve carbon rims on Industry Nine hubs mullet. SRAM XX AXS T-Type. Full carbon frame.

name: Pivot Shuttle SL XO1
alt: Pivot Shuttle SL lightweight e-MTB
desc: Only 17kg! Fazua 60 motor, 430Wh battery. Fox Factory 36 fork, Fox Float X Factory Kashima shock. SRAM X01 T-Type 12-speed. Done less than 100 miles. As new condition!

name: Yeti E160 2023
alt: Yeti E160 2023 full carbon e-MTB
desc: Immaculate condition, invisiframed from new. Fox Factory Kashima 38 fork, Fox Float Factory X2 shock. Shimano EP8 motor, 630Wh battery. Full carbon frame. Shimano XT brakes & drivetrain.

name: Moustache Game 160.7
alt: Moustache Game 160.7 Night Rider Blue e-MTB
desc: Night Rider Blue. Bosch Gen 5 motor 100Nm. Fox 38 fork 170mm, Fox Float X 160mm. Upgraded SRAM Code Ultimate brakes. Shimano XT 12-speed. 600Wh battery. Very low mileage!

name: Mondraker Crafty XR 2024
alt: Mondraker Crafty XR full Öhlins e-MTB
desc: Full Öhlins e-bike! RXF 38 170mm fork, TTX Air shock. Bosch Performance CX motor. SRAM GX Eagle 12-speed, SRAM Code brakes. Mavic E-Deemax wheels. Done 42 miles from new!

name: Specialized Kenevo SL Expert
alt: Specialized Kenevo SL Expert super light e-MTB
desc: Super light e-bike — only 19kg! Full carbon frame. Fox Elite 38 fork, Fox DPX2 shock. SRAM Code brakes, SRAM GX Eagle AXS 12-speed. Specialized Mahle motor. 15 charge cycles from new!

name: Moustache Game 150.8
alt: Moustache Game 150.8 e-MTB
desc: Ex-staff bike, done 80 miles! Fox 36 Performance fork, Moustache Magic Grip shock. Bosch Gen 5 motor 100Nm, 750Wh battery. Shimano XT brakes 4-piston. Full warranty for new owner!

name: Vitus Sommet E-Bike
alt: Vitus Sommet e-MTB bargain
desc: Grab a bargain! RockShox Zeb Select fork, Super Deluxe rear shock. Shimano EP8 motor, 630Wh battery. Shimano SLX brakes & drivetrain. DT Swiss EX1700 wheels mullet. 600 miles from new.

name: Rocky Mountain Altitude Powerplay
alt: Rocky Mountain Altitude Powerplay A70 e-MTB
desc: Fox 38 fork, Fox Float rear shock. Shimano XT 12-speed drivetrain & brakes. 730Wh battery, 108Nm torque. Aluminium frame. Race Face dropper post.

name: Santa Cruz Bullit CC 2022
alt: Santa Cruz Bullit CC full carbon e-MTB
desc: Full carbon frame. RockShox Zeb fork, Super Deluxe coil shock. SRAM GX Eagle 12-speed, Shimano Saint brakes. Race Face carbon bars. 625Wh battery. Mullet wheels. 600 miles.

name: Ibis Ripmo AF Rose 2026
alt: Ibis Ripmo AF Rose brand new trail bike
desc: Brand new, just built out of the box! RockShox Lyrik fork, Super Deluxe Select+ shock. SRAM Eagle 90 Transmission. SRAM Maven brakes. Maxxis DHF/DHR II tyres. Alot of spec for the money!

name: Whyte T-140 RS 2025
alt: Whyte T-140 RS trail mountain bike
desc: As new, immaculate! Fox 34 Performance Elite 140mm Grip 2 fork, Fox DPS Performance Elite shock. SRAM GX Eagle 12-speed. SRAM Guide G2 R brakes. Race Face AR-30 wheels. Like showroom condition.

name: Specialized Stumpjumper
alt: Specialized Stumpjumper S4 trail bike
desc: Good condition. Fox 36 Performance fork, Fox DPS rear shock. SRAM G2 brakes, SRAM NX 12-speed drivetrain. Specialized Roval wheels. X Fusion dropper post. Great all-rounder.

name: Marin Rift Zone 2023
alt: Marin Rift Zone carbon trail bike
desc: Carbon frame — weighs nothing! Marzocchi Bomber Z2 fork, Fox Float DPS shock. Shimano XT/Deore 12-speed drivetrain. Shimano Deore brakes. 29" wheels.

name: Santa Cruz Nomad C S 2024
alt: Santa Cruz Nomad C S enduro bike mullet setup
desc: Very good condition, invisiframed from new! Fox 38 fork, RockShox Super Deluxe shock. Hope Tech 4 V4 brakes with Galfer rotors. SRAM GX Eagle 12-speed. Race Face Arc 30 wheels.

name: Nukeproof Giga Dream Build
alt: Nukeproof Giga custom dream build enduro bike
desc: Full carbon frame, 8k build! Fox 38 Factory fork, EXT coil shock. SRAM XX1 Eagle AXS T-Type, XX1 carbon cranks. Hope Tech 4 V4 brakes. Hope Pro 5 hubs on DT Swiss EX511 rims. Bargain!

name: Mondraker Raze R 2023
alt: Mondraker Raze R carbon enduro bike
desc: Immaculate condition! Full carbon frame — weighs nothing. Fox 36 fork, Fox Float DPS shock. SRAM G2 brakes. SRAM GX Eagle 12-speed. DT Swiss EX1700 wheels. 180mm dropper.

name: Orange Switch 2021
alt: Orange Switch enduro bike with Hope components
desc: Amazing condition. RockShox Lyrik fork, Super Deluxe shock. Hope Tech 3 V4 brakes. Shimano XT 12-speed. Stans Flow wheels on Hope hubs. Hope cranks, BB, headset & seatclamp. Mullet setup.
